title: To A Friend
content:
Here in the fairway
    Fetching--foul of keel,
    Long-stray but fortunate--
    Out of the fogs, the vast
    Atlantic solitudes.
    Shall, by the hawser-pin
    Waiting the signal
    Leave--go--anchor!
    Scent the familiar,
    The unforgettable
    Fragrance of home;
    So in a long breath
    Bless us unknowing:
    Bless them, the violets,
    Bless me, the gardener,
    Bless thee, the giver.
meaning:
"To A Friend" is a quintessential example of Arthur Thomas Quiller-Couch's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
